docs.title: About
docs.text: Last updated: 8th November 2025 at 17:10 CEST

docs.title: About Teanote
docs.text: Teanote is a web application for tea enthusiasts.

docs.title: Teanote features
docs.text:
The main features are:

  1. brew timer (time your infusions / steeps)
  2. tea profiles (curate your personal inventory w/ all tea details)
  3. journaling (write notes about your fave teas / brews / brew presets)

docs.title: Features info
docs.text:
• A tea can be linked to a brew preset
  • A brew preset and tea can be linked to a journal

docs.title: Why is there no lifetime pricing option?
docs.text:
Because it wouldn't be sustainable. Teanote is meant to grow with you over time — you log & try new teas, change infusion times, experiment, make journal entries, and explore more as your tea journey evolves.

A one-time payment model might seem like a good deal upfront, but it usually leads to apps becoming abandoned or rarely used (e.g. VSCO or Ulysses — they both had to switch to a subscription model eventually to keep up with server costs and survive). With a small ongoing subscription, Teanote can keep improving and you stay more engaged in using it regularly.

docs.title: Do you offer student or teacher discount?
docs.text: No.

docs.title: What are available payment methods?
docs.text: You can pay with any Visa, MasterCard or AmericanExpress card via Stripe.

docs.title: Is it secure to use my card information?
docs.text: With Teanote Stripe.com is used for online payments. Stripe has been audited and certified to PCI Service Provider Level 1. That is the most strict level of certification available in the payment industry.

docs.title: Cookie Policy
docs.text:
Last updated: 4th November 2025 at 23:15 CEST

Teanote (“we”, “our”, or “us”) is committed to respecting your privacy and ensuring transparency in how we use cookies and similar tracking technologies on our services, including teanote.xyz, app.teanote.xyz, and docs.teanote.xyz.

This Cookie Policy explains what cookies are, the types of cookies we use, how we use them, and your rights and choices regarding cookies.

docs.title: 1. What Are Cookies?
docs.text: Cookies are small text files placed on your device by websites or apps you visit. They help us provide, improve, and personalize your experience by remembering preferences, enabling basic functionality, and collecting analytics data.

docs.title: 2. Types of Cookies We Use
docs.text: We use the following categories of cookies on Teanote services:

docs.title: a. Strictly Necessary Cookies
docs.text: These cookies are essential for the operation of our services. They enable core features like authentication, security, and session management. You cannot opt-out of these cookies as they are required for the service you request.

docs.title: b. Performance and Analytics Cookies
docs.text: These cookies collect anonymous information about how users interact with the website and app, such as page visits, user behavior, and load times. This data helps us improve performance and usability. Analytics tools may include providers such as Google Analytics with consent.

docs.title: c. Functional Cookies
docs.text: Functional cookies remember your preferences (e.g., language, theme) to personalize your experience.

docs.title: d. Marketing and Advertising Cookies
docs.text: We currently do not use marketing or advertising cookies. If this changes, we will update this policy accordingly.

docs.title: 3. Third-Party Cookies
docs.text:
We only use third-party cookies from trusted partners who assist us with analytics and hosting:

  • Google Analytics (optional, with consent)
  • Stripe and LemonSqueezy for secure payment processing (no direct tracking here)
  • Hosting providers such as Railway and hostcreators.sk

We disclose any third-party cookies and link to their privacy policies where applicable.

docs.title: 4. Cookie Consent and Control
docs.text:
Under GDPR and ePrivacy Directive, we require your explicit opt-in consent before placing any non-essential cookies.

  • On your first visit, a cookie banner explains cookie usage and seeks your consent.
  • You can accept, reject, or customize cookie preferences.
  • We block all non-essential cookies until you provide consent.
  • You can change or withdraw your consent any time via cookie settings accessible within our services.
  • Refusing non-essential cookies will not impact your access to core features.

docs.title: 5. How to Manage Cookies
docs.text:
You have full control over cookies through:

  • Your browser settings (to block or delete cookies)
  • Our cookie preference center (via the cookie banner or app settings)

Please note that disabling necessary cookies may limit certain features or prevent the service from working properly.

docs.title: 6. Cookie Duration
docs.text:
Cookies may be session-based (deleted after you close your browser) or persistent (remain for a specified duration). Examples include:

Cookie Type Duration Session cookies Until browser closed Analytics cookies Up to 2 years Functional cookies Up to 1 year

docs.title: 7. Updates to This Cookie Policy
docs.text: We may update this policy to reflect changes in our practices or legal requirements. The latest version is always available at https://docs.teanote.xyz/privacy. Continued use of Teanote services signifies acceptance of updated policies.

docs.title: 8. Contact Us
docs.text:
If you have questions or concerns about cookies or privacy, please contact:

Name: Daniel Radosa E-mail: info@teanote.xyz

docs.title: Privacy
docs.text: Last updated: 5th November 2025 at 23:13 CEST

docs.title: Privacy Policy
docs.text:
Teanote (“we”, “our”, or “us”) is owned and operated by Daniel Radosa, with arrangements in Slovakia and Denmark. We are committed to respecting your privacy and complying with applicable data protection laws, including the GDPR (General Data Protection Regulation, EU Regulation 2016/679).

This Privacy Policy explains what information we collect, how we collect it, how we use it, how you can exercise your rights, and your options to control your data. By accessing or using Teanote services at teanote.xyz, app.teanote.xyz, and our documentation at docs.teanote.xyz, you agree to the practices described here.

We periodically review and update this policy to ensure GDPR compliance and better safeguard your data rights.

docs.title: 1. Definitions
docs.text:
• "Platform": The Teanote app, website, APIs, and related services.
  • "User": Anyone accessing or using Teanote.
  • "Services": All digital products, web, and hosting services provided by Teanote.

docs.title: 2.1 Account & Authentication Data
docs.text:
• Email address (info@teanote.xyz)
  • Profile data (optional pseudonyms or names)
  • Login credentials (hashed passwords)

docs.title: 2.2 Usage Data
docs.text:
• IP addresses
  • Browser type, device info
  • Interaction logs and analytics data
  • Cookies, site visits, and activity timestamps

docs.title: 2.3 Payment Data
docs.text:
• Payment card details processed securely by Stripe or LemonSqueezy
  • Billing address (only for tax purposes, stored securely via Stripe/LemonSqueezy)

docs.title: 2.4 Support & Communications
docs.text: • Correspondence, support requests, and legal inquiries

docs.title: 3. Purpose and Legal Basis for Processing
docs.text:
Our data processing is grounded on GDPR principles:

  • Contractual Necessity: To provide, deliver, and maintain services.
  • Legal Obligation: To comply with tax and legal regulations.
  • Legitimate Interests: Improving service quality, security, and security auditing.
  • Your Consent: For optional data collection like marketing and analytics.

You can withdraw consent anytime by contacting us at info@teanote.xyz.

docs.title: 4. Your Rights Under GDPR
docs.text:
In accordance with GDPR (art. 15–22), you have rights to:

  • Access your personal data.
  • Correct inaccuracies.
  • Request erasure (“right to be forgotten”).
  • Data portability.
  • Restrict or object to processing.
  • Withdraw consent.
  • Lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority.

You can exercise these rights by contacting us at info@teanote.xyz. We will respond to your requests within 10 working days.

docs.title: 5. Data Sharing and Security
docs.text:
• Data is shared only with trusted third parties necessary for service delivery:
  • Railway (hosting services)
  • Stripe or LemonSqueezy (payment processors)
  • hostcreators.sk (website hosting)
  • We do not sell your data.
  • We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your data. However, no method of transmission over the internet or electronic storage is 100% secure.

docs.title: 6. Data Retention
docs.text:
• We store your data only as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes outlined.
  • Data related to your account will be retained until you request deletion.
  • You may request data deletion at any time via info@teanote.xyz.

docs.title: 7. International Data Transfers
docs.text: Your data may be stored and processed in Slovakia, Denmark, or other countries with GDPR adequacy decisions or similar protections in place.

docs.title: 8. Cookies & Tracking Technologies
docs.text: We use cookies, pixels, and similar tools to enhance your experience. You can manage your preferences through your browser settings. For detailed cookie management and related controls, see our Cookies Policy.

docs.title: 9. Automated Decision-Making & Profiling
docs.text: We do not use automated decision-making or profiling that impacts your rights under GDPR.

docs.title: 10. Data Security and Breach Notification
docs.text: In the event of a data breach that impacts your personal data, we will notify you and relevant authorities within the GDPR-mandated timeline, 72 hours, where applicable.

docs.title: 11. Contact & Further Information
docs.text:
For privacy inquiries, data access requests, or complaints, please contact:

Daniel Radosa Email: info@teanote.xyz Address: Norgesgade 40 1.sal, Esbjerg 6700, Denmark

docs.title: 12. Regular Updates
docs.text: This Privacy Policy will be reviewed annually. We will notify you of material changes by updating the policy on docs.teanote.xyz/privacy.

docs.title: Terms
docs.text: Last updated: 5th November 2025 at 23:13 CEST

docs.title: Terms of service
docs.text: These Terms of Service (“Terms”) govern your access to and use of the services provided by Teanote, including our websites, APIs, email notifications, and applications (collectively, the “Services” or “Teanote”), as well as any information, text, graphics, photos, or other materials uploaded, downloaded, or appearing on the Services (collectively, “Content”). Teanote is owned and operated by Daniel Radosa, based in Slovakia and Denmark (referred to as “I”, “Me”, “Our”, or “We”). As a customer of this service, you are referred to as a “User” or “You” under this agreement. Your access to and use of the Services are conditioned on your acceptance of and compliance with these Terms. By accessing or using the Services, you agree to be bound by these Terms. We reserve the right to update or modify these Terms at any time without prior notice. Any new features or tools added to the Services shall also be subject to these Terms. Continued use of the Services following changes constitutes your acceptance of such modifications. You can always review the most current version of the Terms of Service here: https://docs.teanote.xyz/terms

docs.title: Account registration and passwords
docs.text: Certain Services may require you to create an account with Teanote. You agree that all information you provide during registration is accurate, current, and complete. We reserve the right to disable or terminate any user account at our sole discretion, with or without cause, including for breach of these Terms. You are responsible for safeguarding your password and any activities conducted under your account. We recommend choosing strong passwords and logging out after each session. Teanote is not liable for any loss or damage resulting from your failure to maintain security. Please notify us immediately at info@teanote.xyz of any unauthorized use or security breach affecting your account. Note that your password is crucial for decrypting your note data stored at rest. We cannot restore your data without your password. Each login is intended for a single user only. Shared credentials are not permitted; you may create separate accounts for multiple users. Using the Service for unlawful purposes or violating any applicable laws, including copyright laws, is prohibited.

docs.title: Privacy
docs.text: All information you provide is governed by our Privacy Policy, available at https://docs.teanote.xyz/privacy. By using the Services, you consent to the collection and use of your information as described therein, including transfer to and storage in Slovakia, Denmark, or other countries where Teanote operates. We may send you essential communications related to the Services, including administrative messages, which are considered part of your account and cannot be opted out of.

docs.title: Payment and refunds
docs.text: The Service includes a 30-day free trial period. Continued usage beyond this trial requires prepaid subscription. Failure to pay suspends your account until payment is received. No refunds or credits are provided for partial billing periods. All fees exclude applicable taxes, which are your responsibility. Your payment method will be charged automatically at the start of each billing cycle. Changes in subscription plans with different billing cycles may adjust your billing date accordingly.

docs.title: API terms
docs.text: Access to your Service data via Teanote's API is subject to these Terms and specific API conditions: - We disclaim liability for damages arising from API use or third-party applications accessing the Service via the API. - Excessive or abusive API requests may lead to temporary or permanent suspension of your API access after reasonable notice.

docs.title: Cancellation and termination
docs.text: You are solely responsible for canceling your account via https://app.teanote.xyz/account. Email or phone requests do not qualify as cancellation. Upon cancellation, all your content becomes immediately inaccessible and permanently deleted with no recovery options. If cancellation occurs before the end of the billing period, it takes effect immediately without further charges. We reserve the right to suspend or terminate any account at our discretion for any reason, including violations of these Terms or unlawful behavior. Termination results in loss of access and content. Accounts deactivated due to non-payment will be terminated after 6 months.

docs.title: Modifications to service and pricing
docs.text: We may modify or discontinue any aspect of the Service temporarily or permanently with or without notice. Prices are subject to change with 30 days' advance notice via our site or the Service. We are not liable for any loss arising from service changes, price adjustments, suspensions, or discontinuations.

docs.title: Copyright and content ownership
docs.text: Users must comply with Slovakia and Denmark copyright laws regarding posted content. You retain ownership of all your content. We hold no intellectual property rights over your material. We do not pre-screen content but reserve the right to remove or refuse any content deemed unlawful or inappropriate. The visual design and code of the Service are copyright © Daniel Radosa. Unauthorized duplication or use is prohibited.

docs.title: General conditions
docs.text: The Service is provided “as is” without warranty. Use is at your own risk. Technical support is available only via email at info@teanote.xyz. Third-party vendors and hosting partners provide infrastructure to deliver the Service. You agree not to misuse or exploit the Service or infringe on our intellectual property. We reserve rights to remove unlawful content and terminate abusive users. Excessive use impacting other users’ experience may lead to temporary suspension after notice. We do not guarantee uninterrupted or error-free service or specific results. We disclaim liability for any damages arising from use or inability to use the Service. Failure to enforce any provision does not waive future enforcement rights. These Terms are the entire agreement governing your use and supersede all prior agreements. Questions about these Terms should be emailed to info@teanote.xyz.
